channel.title: Brine and Bubble
channel.description: Fresh takes for home fermenters and pickling hobbyists.

item.title: Ask the forge: your troubleshooting questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the troubleshooting questions home fermenters and pickling hobbyists keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in miso with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest miso adjustments that home fermenters and pickling hobbyists report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: kombucha second ferment
item.description: The persistent myths around kombucha second ferment, stress-tested against what home fermenters and pickling hobbyists actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your vegetables in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying vegetables project for home fermenters — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/pickling is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the troubleshooting community this week.

item.title: The miso checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified miso purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: The state of Vegetables in 2026
item.description: A field report on vegetables: where things stand, and what home fermenters and pickling hobbyists should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Kombucha without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to kombucha for home fermenters and pickling hobbyists — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "fermentation for beginners" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "fermentation for beginners" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why home fermenters are rethinking Miso
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how home fermenters and pickling hobbyists approach miso — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Troubleshooting on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in troubleshooting — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Kombucha: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping kombucha for home fermenters and pickling hobbyists.
